3162650.name: The Eyes of Ouros
3162650.description:
The surface is dead, the underground is the only place left with a chance of survival, not that survival down there is easy, just possible. You and up three friends can explore procedurally generated levels descending deeper underground.

Intense Co-op Horror Experience

  • Team up with 1-4 players in heart-pounding cooperative gameplay

  • Communicate and coordinate to survive the darkness below

  • Revive fallen teammates or face the depths alone

Roguelite Progression System

  • No two runs are the same with infinitely generating underground levels

  • Discover powerful artifacts, weapons, and equipment to enhance your survival chances

Unique Character Classes

  • Choose from distinct characters, each with specialized abilities and playstyles

  • Master unique skills that complement your team's strategy
3162650.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
